title: All stream references use canonical RedisStreams constants
evidence: Grep for hardcoded stream: strings in changed .ts files returned 0 matches
actual: No hardcoded stream names found in changed files

title: Consumer group names are consistent across services
evidence: coordinator-group (coordinator.ts:396), cross-chain-detector-group (detector.ts:333,346,353), execution-engine-group (opportunity.consumer.ts:174, fast-lane.consumer.ts:102), mempool-detector-group (mempool-config.ts:77), orderflow-pipeline (orderflow-pipeline-consumer.ts:85), failover-{serviceName} (cross-region-health.ts:750)
actual: 6 consumer group patterns found, all consistent

title: STREAM_MAX_LENGTHS covers all 24 RedisStreams constants
evidence: RedisStreams in events.ts defines 24 stream names. STREAM_MAX_LENGTHS in streams.ts:404-432 has 24 entries. xaddWithLimit has DEFAULT_STREAM_MAX_LENGTH=5000 fallback (SA-1C-004 fix confirmed).
expected: 24 streams in STREAM_MAX_LENGTHS, fallback default for unknown streams

title: No unmatched xReadGroup without xack in changed files
evidence: StreamConsumer handles ACK internally. Changed files use processOpportunityBatch which returns stream message IDs for ACK. opportunity.consumer.ts uses deferred ACK pattern with pendingAcks map.
expected: All xReadGroup calls have matching ACK
actual: ACK handled by StreamConsumer and deferred ACK pattern

title: auth.ts parseInt without NaN guard on Redis-sourced string
evidence: auth.ts:407 - parseInt(lockoutUntil) with no radix and no NaN check. lockoutUntil comes from Redis get() which always returns strings, but if Redis data is corrupted parseInt returns NaN causing Date.now() < NaN to be false (lockout bypassed).
expected: parseInt with radix 10 and NaN guard
actual: parseInt(lockoutUntil) - no radix, no NaN guard
recommendation: Use parseInt(lockoutUntil, 10) and add NaN check: if (Number.isNaN(lockoutTime)) handle error

title: Coordinator middleware uses raw parseInt for rate limit env vars
evidence: services/coordinator/src/api/middleware/index.ts:62-63 - parseInt(process.env.API_RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS || empty, 10) || (15*60*1000). The || fallback is acceptable here since 0ms window is invalid, but pattern is inconsistent with codebase convention of using parseEnvInt/parseEnvIntSafe.
expected: Use parseEnvInt or parseEnvIntSafe for consistency
recommendation: Consider migrating to parseEnvInt for consistency, but functional behavior is correct - LOW priority

title: No || 0 or || 0n patterns in changed files
evidence: Grep for || 0 and || 0n in all 14 changed .ts files returned 0 matches

title: HMAC signing enforcement is correct and fail-closed
evidence: streams.ts:459-464 throws in production when STREAM_SIGNING_KEY is unset. .env.example:616 documents STREAM_SIGNING_KEY. hmac-utils.ts handles empty/whitespace keys. verifySignature uses crypto.timingSafeEqual.

title: Feature flags count and cross-deps validated
evidence: FEATURE_FLAGS object in feature-flags.ts has 23 flags. Cross-dep checks: useMevShareBackrun requires useMevShare (line 775), useSignalCacheRead requires useMLSignalScoring (line 653), useMLSignalScoring warns without useMomentumTracking (line 664). All use === true except useDynamicL1Fees which uses !== false (intentional opt-out documented).

title: Risk config params documented with bounds validation
evidence: risk-config.ts: All params use parseEnvFloat/parseEnvInt/parseEnvBigInt with explicit bounds. validateRiskConfig() runs at import time (skipped in test). Cross-validates defaultWinProbability >= minWinProbability. RISK_TOTAL_CAPITAL required in production.
actual: All params have bounds and cross-validation

title: ~35 raw parseInt/parseFloat on process.env across service files
evidence: Found raw parseInt/parseFloat in: (1) coordinator/api/middleware/index.ts:62-63 (rate limits), (2) unified-detector/chain-instance.ts:277,280,283,764 (WS reconnect), (3) execution-engine/strategies/base.strategy.ts:107,109,145, (4) execution-engine/engine.ts:362-364,396,401,410,800, (5) execution-engine/services/gas-price-optimizer.ts:183-199 (wrapped by validateGasPrice). Not in changed files but present as tech debt.
recommendation: Incremental migration to parseEnvIntSafe - not blocking for deploy but should be tracked as tech debt

title: Redis streams.ts and client.ts have aligned connection settings
evidence: Both files use connectTimeout: 3000 (streams.ts:493, client.ts:240). Both use lazyConnect: true. Both have reconnectOnError for READONLY. Both use maxRetriesPerRequest: 3. retryStrategy patterns match (capped exponential backoff).
expected: Connection settings parity between client.ts and streams.ts

title: No port collisions in service-ports.json
evidence: service-ports.json defines 11 unique ports: 3000-3009, 3100. No duplicates. Docker compose files use internal port 3001 for partitions (isolated namespaces) with host-mapped ports 3011-3016.

title: No new empty catch blocks in changed files
evidence: opportunity-router.ts:927 catch {} commented as file-not-exist check (acceptable). All other catch blocks in changed files log errors. auth.ts SA-1M-004 fix confirmed at line 832.
actual: All catch blocks either log or have documented intentional rationale

title: stream-serialization.ts isFinite guards confirmed in place
evidence: stream-serialization.ts lines 50-51 (profitPercentage), 53 (confidence), 62-64 (expectedProfit, estimatedProfit) all use isFinite guard. SA-1N-003 fix confirmed.
expected: isFinite guards on all numeric serialization
actual: Guards present on all 4 numeric fields

title: health:system:snapshot prefix confirmed unique
evidence: enhanced-health-monitor.ts:544 uses health:system:snapshot. self-healing-manager writes to health:${serviceName}. No prefix collision.

title: No spread operators in hot-path loops
evidence: caching/price-matrix.ts has no spread operators in loops. Hot-path code clean.

title: No inter-service HTTP calls found
evidence: Grep for fetch()/axios/got in services/*/src/*.ts returned 0 matches. All inter-service communication uses Redis Streams per ADR-002.

title: Circuit breaker threshold defaults to 5 per ADR-018
evidence: simple-circuit-breaker.ts:76 constructor default threshold=5. Line 191 factory default threshold=5. coordinator.ts:420 executionCbThreshold default=5.

title: SharedArrayBuffer used in price-matrix
evidence: caching/price-matrix.ts, caching/shared-memory-cache.ts, caching/shared-key-registry.ts, async/worker-pool.ts all reference SharedArrayBuffer - L1 cache architecture per ADR-005 is intact.

title: Coordinator Dockerfile healthcheck interval (30s) diverges from Docker Compose and Fly.io (15s)
evidence: services/coordinator/Dockerfile:20 HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s. docker-compose.partition.yml:459, docker-compose.testnet.yml:267, docker-compose.yml:115 all use interval: 15s. Fly coordinator.toml:64 uses interval=15s. Only affects standalone container runs (Compose overrides it).
expected: Consistent 15s interval across all deployment targets
recommendation: Change Dockerfile HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s to --interval=15s for consistency with ADR-007

title: Docker Compose Redis eviction policy consistent (noeviction)
evidence: docker-compose.yml:10, docker-compose.partition.yml:98, docker-compose.testnet.yml:39 all use --maxmemory-policy noeviction. SA-1Q-009 fix confirmed.

title: Coordinator Dockerfile uses wget (SA-1Q-008 fix confirmed)
evidence: services/coordinator/Dockerfile:21 uses wget -qO- instead of curl

title: Health check paths consistent across Docker Compose and Fly.io
evidence: Coordinator: /api/health everywhere. Partitions: /health on respective ports. Execution-engine: /health on 3005/8080. Cross-chain: /health on 3006.
actual: All paths align between Compose and Fly configs

title: Coordinator shutdown timeout hierarchy is correct
evidence: coordinator/src/index.ts:191 shutdownTimeoutMs=15000 > Redis connectTimeout=3000 (streams.ts:493, client.ts:240). SA-1R-002 fix confirmed.

title: Cross-chain detector shutdown timeout hierarchy is correct
evidence: detector.ts:515 SHUTDOWN_TIMEOUT_MS=4000 per disconnect (2 disconnects = 8s effective). Redis connectTimeout=3000. SA-1R-003 fix confirmed.
